tables.name: collections
tables.label: Collections
tables.description: Things to compare — each collection defines its own attributes.

tables.name: items
tables.label: Items
tables.description: The entries inside a collection (the things being compared).

tables.name: tierlists
tables.label: Tier lists
tables.description: Saved opinionated rankings of a collection's items into tiers.

tables.name: creations
tables.label: Creations
tables.description: Published tier lists / comparisons others can vote on.

tables.name: votes
tables.label: Votes
tables.description: The full vote matrix — one row per user's vote on a creation.

tables.name: replies
tables.label: Replies
tables.description: Conversation on a creation — one row per reply, pulled back the way votes are.

tables.name: posts
tables.label: Your posts
tables.description: Your own posts — private to you by default, shared outward by choice.

tables.name: contacts
tables.label: People
tables.description: People you can share a post with.

tables.name: circles
tables.label: Groups
tables.description: Named groups you can share a post with (each lists its members).

tables.name: postvotes
tables.label: Your post votes
tables.description: Local vote tallies on your own posts (not synced).
